query: Could you help me design a one-week travel itinerary departing from Devils Lake and heading to Colorado, covering a total of 3 cities? The travel dates are set between March 22nd and March 28th, 2022. This trip is for a single person with a budget of $3,500.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Devils Lake to Alamosa, duration: 17 hours 26 mins, distance: 1,811 km, cost: 90
plan.attraction: San Luis Valley Museum; Rio Grande Farm Park; Cole Park;
plan.accommodation: Comfortable studio suite in midtown Manhattan, Alamosa

plan.breakfast: Cafe Coffee Day - The Lounge, Alamosa
plan.attraction: Alamosa National Wildlife Refuge and Visitor Center; Toivo Malm Trail System;
plan.accommodation: Comfortable studio suite in midtown Manhattan, Alamosa

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Alamosa to Grand Junction, duration: 4 hours 29 mins, distance: 396 km, cost: 19
plan.attraction: Museum of the West, Museums of Western Colorado; Eureka! McConnell Science Museum;
plan.accommodation: Modern apartment in the heart of Williamsburg, Grand Junction

plan.attraction: Western Colorado Botanical Gardens; James M. Robb - Colorado River State Park;
plan.accommodation: Modern apartment in the heart of Williamsburg, Grand Junction

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Grand Junction to Gunnison, duration: 2 hours 27 mins, distance: 200 km, cost: 10
plan.attraction: Black Canyon of the Gunnison National Park; Gunnison Pioneer Museum;
plan.lunch: Happy Joe's Pizza & Ice Cream, Gunnison
plan.accommodation: SoHo LOFT #2 Broadway Av. - Amazing Location!, Gunnison

plan.dinner: Game of Legends - Sports Bar, Grill, & Lounge, Gunnison
plan.accommodation: SoHo LOFT #2 Broadway Av. - Amazing Location!, Gunnison

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Gunnison to Devils Lake, duration: 17 hours 30 mins, distance: 1,881 km, cost: 94
